EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IGeoTransformationOperationSet

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control a set of geographic transformation operators (GT + direction).

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("0049530E-E3EC-11D3-9F62-00C04F6BDD7F")]
public interface IGeoTransformationOperationSet

Properties

Count

The number of geographic transformations in the set.

int Count { get; }

Property Value

int

pToGCS IGeographicCoordinateSystem
Direction esriTransformDirection
Transformation IGeoTransformation

Next(out esriTransformDirection, out IGeoTransformation)

Retrieves the next geographic transformation in the set.
